# stremio_addon_collection (Resource)

Manages the full Stremio addon collection for the authenticated account.

Terraform treats this resource as authoritative and will add/remove addons to match `transport_urls`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `transport_urls` (Set of String) Set of desired addon manifest `transportUrl` values. Add a URL to install it, remove a URL to uninstall it.

### Optional

- `email` (String) Optional account email for this resource. If set (with `password`), the resource authenticates with these credentials instead of provider-level credentials.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Optional account password for this resource. Required when `email` is set.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Static resource identifier (`addon-collection`).
